expectations.evidence: ContentRecommendationsBlock.php line 23: 'extends BlockBase implements ContainerFactoryPluginInterface' -- correct plugin DI interface.

expectations.text: create() method has 4 parameters: container, configuration, plugin_id, plugin_definition
expectations.evidence: ContentRecommendationsBlock.php line 34: 'public static function create(ContainerInterface $container, array $configuration, $plugin_id, $plugin_definition)' -- all 4 params.

expectations.text: Constructor calls parent::__construct($configuration, $plugin_id, $plugin_definition) with exactly 3 plugin params
expectations.evidence: ContentRecommendationsBlock.php line 31: 'parent::__construct($configuration, $plugin_id, $plugin_definition)' -- exactly 3 params before service.

expectations.text: Block uses blockForm() and blockSubmit() for config (not buildForm/submitForm)
expectations.evidence: ContentRecommendationsBlock.php lines 49 and 69: 'blockForm()' and 'blockSubmit()' -- correct block config form methods.

expectations.text: defaultConfiguration() returns array with default values
build() returns render array with #cache metadata (tags or contexts)
expectations.evidence: ContentRecommendationsBlock.php lines 96-100: '#cache' => ['tags' => ['node_list'], 'contexts' => ['user'], 'max-age' => 3600]. Also includes #cache in empty-state return (lines 80-83).

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en content_recommendations returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list showing content_recommendations in enabled modules.

expectations.text: Block can be placed and renders without error
expectations.evidence: Block placed via Block::create() to content region. Front page renders without 'Broken' or error messages. Block displays empty-state 'No recommendations available' (stub service returns empty).
